title: Web Development
shortDescription: Custom websites and web apps built to perform
hero: Your website is the first impression most people get of your business. We build fast, clean, custom sites and web applications that look sharp, work properly, and are easy to manage — without the bloat.

process.title: Discovery
process.description: We learn what your business needs from the site — who visits it, what they should do, and what success looks like for you.

process.title: Design & Build
process.description: We design and develop in close collaboration. You see it taking shape before it's done, so nothing is a surprise.

process.title: Test & Launch
process.description: We test across devices and browsers, fix everything that needs fixing, then launch — and stay available afterwards.

audience: Businesses that need a website that actually works — whether you're starting from scratch, replacing an outdated site, or building something more complex like a web app or client portal.

title: App Development
shortDescription: iOS and Android apps, built right
hero: A good app does one thing well and gets out of the way. We build mobile applications for iOS and Android that are fast, intuitive, and built around how your users actually think — not how developers do.
features: App Store and Google Play submission

process.title: Scope & Design
process.description: We define what the app needs to do, map the user flows, and design the interface before a line of code is written.

process.title: Build & Integrate
process.description: We build the app and connect it to whatever it needs — your existing systems, third-party services, or a new backend.

process.title: Test & Submit
process.description: Thorough testing across real devices, followed by submission to the App Store and Google Play — guided from start to finish.

audience: Businesses with a workflow, product, or service that works better as an app — whether it's for your customers, your team, or both.

title: AI & Automation
shortDescription: Smart systems that save time and scale with you
hero: The right automation removes repetition without removing the human touch. We identify where your business is losing time and build AI-powered systems that handle the routine work — so your team can focus on what actually matters.
features: Business process automation mapping and build

process.title: Process Audit
process.description: We map your current workflows to identify what's repetitive, error-prone, or slower than it should be.

process.title: Design & Build
process.description: We design the automation solution, build it, and connect it to your existing tools and data sources.

process.title: Test & Hand Over
process.description: We test against real scenarios, train your team, and document everything so you're never dependent on us.

audience: Businesses doing repetitive manual work at scale — data entry, document handling, customer queries, reporting — that could be partially or fully automated without losing quality.

title: Cloud & Infrastructure
shortDescription: Reliable, scalable infrastructure that stays up
hero: Infrastructure shouldn't be something you think about — until it breaks. We design and manage cloud infrastructure that is reliable, secure, and sized correctly for your business, so it scales when you need it to and doesn't cost more than it should.
features: Cloud setup and migration (AWS, Azure, GCP)

process.title: Assess
process.description: We review your current setup — on-premise, cloud, or hybrid — and identify what needs to change, what to keep, and what to migrate.

process.title: Architect & Deploy
process.description: We design the right infrastructure for your workload and deploy it with security, redundancy, and cost-efficiency built in.

process.title: Monitor & Maintain
process.description: Ongoing monitoring, updates and incident response — so you don't have to watch dashboards or wake up to downtime alerts.

audience: Businesses running on ageing infrastructure, moving to the cloud for the first time, or struggling with reliability, cost, or performance in their current setup.

title: Cybersecurity
shortDescription: Protecting your data, systems and reputation
hero: Cybersecurity isn't just for enterprise. Small and medium businesses are targeted constantly — usually because their defences are easier to breach. We harden your systems, train your people, and make sure you're not the easiest target in the room.
features: Data backup and disaster recovery planning

process.title: Audit
process.description: We assess your current security posture — systems, software, access controls and staff practices — and identify the biggest risks.

process.title: Harden
process.description: We implement the right controls: firewalls, endpoint protection, access policies, secure backups and more, tailored to your risk level.

process.title: Maintain & Train
process.description: Security isn't a once-off. We monitor, update and train your team so the defences hold over time.

audience: Any business that handles customer data, processes payments, or relies on systems being available — which is most businesses. Especially those that haven't reviewed their security in a while.

title: IT Support & Admin
shortDescription: Day-to-day support so your team keeps moving
hero: When something breaks, you need it fixed fast — not logged in a ticket queue and forgotten. We provide responsive IT support for businesses that can't afford downtime, handled by people who know your setup.

process.title: Onboarding
process.description: We document your setup, get to know your team's needs and establish a support process that fits how you work.

process.title: Ongoing Support
process.description: Log issues via call, WhatsApp or email — we resolve them remotely when possible, on-site when needed.

process.title: Proactive Maintenance
process.description: We don't just fix things when they break — we schedule updates, check in regularly and catch problems early.

audience: Small and medium businesses without a dedicated IT person — or those with one who needs a capable external partner to handle the volume.

title: Software Integration
shortDescription: Connecting your tools so everything talks
hero: Most businesses run on three to five software tools that don't naturally share data. The result is manual copying, missed updates and avoidable errors. We connect your systems so information flows where it needs to, automatically.
features: CRM, ERP and accounting system integrations

process.title: Map the Gaps
process.description: We document your current tools and identify where data is being duplicated, lost or manually moved between systems.

process.title: Design & Connect
process.description: We build the integrations — through native connectors, APIs or middleware — and test them against your real data.

process.title: Monitor & Maintain
process.description: Integrations break when systems update. We monitor them, fix issues quickly, and keep them running.

audience: Businesses running multiple software tools that don't talk to each other — especially those doing manual data entry or exporting spreadsheets to bridge the gaps.

title: Network & Systems
hero: A slow or unreliable network is a productivity drain that compounds daily. We design, install and maintain business networks that are fast, secure and built to handle how your team actually works — whether you're in one office or spread across several.
features: Wi-Fi setup, optimisation and coverage mapping

process.title: Survey
process.description: We assess your physical space, headcount and usage patterns to design a network that fits your actual needs.

process.title: Install & Configure
process.description: We supply, install and configure the hardware — routers, switches, access points — and set up the security and management layer.

process.title: Monitor & Support
process.description: Ongoing network monitoring, firmware updates and responsive support when issues arise.

audience: Businesses setting up a new office, outgrowing their current network, or dealing with persistent connectivity, speed or coverage problems.
